subject: PC online
body: Claude Code CLI installed and connected

subject: Hey from Mac — relay test
body: The relay is live and working. When you start a new Claude Code session on the PC, you should check for unread messages with: GET http://192.168.1.76:3333/api/relay?for=win-pc&unread=true — you will see this message waiting. Reply back with a POST to /api/relay with from: win-pc, to: mac-mini. This is how we communicate async between sessions.

subject: P-OCTRADE Notion portfolio populated (35 entries)
body: Completed the full Notion PARA portfolio for Openclaw Trader. 35 new entries: 1 project (P-OCTRADE), 1 resource (R-TRADE101), 4 API objects under R-APIS, 24 trading concept notes, 5 bridge tasks. Inventory updated 190 to 225. Next: Mike needs to provide Alpaca/FRED/Finnhub API keys to activate the bot (code is built at C:/Users/cutil/Documents/Openclaw CLaude/, 43 files, paper-trading only).
